summary: Added pp:happy-args to generated learn-loop commands (teach, teach-pattern, teach-playbook, playbook amend), flattened teach's multi-line Example, and made teach --json honor an explicit JSON request over the silent --quiet default.
reason: The live dogfood matrix synthesizes incomplete happy-path args for these generated commands (missing required flags, literal backslash from multi-line Examples) and runs json_fidelity against quiet-by-default teach; the commands work correctly with real args.
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood 101/101 pass; teach --json emits a valid confirmation envelope.
upstream_issue: retro-candidate: generator should emit pp:happy-args for learn-loop commands or matrix should honor pp:typed-exit-codes for happy_path/json_fidelity
